summary.summary: Corrects an incorrect Carbs-on-Board label and makes Live Activity widget item labels localizable. The LiveActivityWidgetConfiguration.swift enum cases that previously returned hard-coded English strings were changed to return localized strings via String(localized:..., comment:...) for: currentGlucoseLarge ("Glucose and Trend, no Delta"), currentGlucose ("Glucose, Trend, Delta"), iob ("Insulin on Board (IOB)"), cob (corrected from "Carbs on Board (IOB)" to "Carbs on Board (COB)"), updatedLabel ("Last Updated"), and totalDailyDose ("Total Daily Dose") (see LiveActivityWidgetConfiguration.swift changes) [file:fec3505198c5, diff:ea61f54b9c0b]. Corresponding entries/comments for these labels were added to the Localizable.xcstrings file (see Localizable.xcstrings changes) [file:c06dce5f6c2f, diff:ea61f54b9c0b]. The pull request and commits record the intent and merge of this change [pr:gordolio/Trio#1184, pr:nightscout/Trio#1184, commit:b0d6f9cfd4a75729fca79ba98fac9f5860757057, commit:702d2b8fb11b1316cebb90fbed9541d88ce1973d].
summary.userFacingImpact: End users should see the Carbs on Board label corrected to read "Carbs on Board (COB)" and Live Activity widget item labels prepared for localization; where translations exist or are later added, those labels can appear in other languages. The changes are limited to label text and localization calls in the widget configuration and string resource file—no changes to logic or behavior are evident in the provided diff, but a human review is recommended if there are concerns about downstream localization/resource pipelines or runtime string-loading (evidence: code and xcstrings changes) [file:fec3505198c5, file:c06dce5f6c2f, diff:ea61f54b9c0b, commit:b0d6f9cfd4a75729fca79ba98fac9f5860757057].
